name: 串并联电路
subject: physics
domain_name: 电与磁 / Electricity & Magnetism / Electricity & Magnetism
curriculum_points:
1.2 Motion
Core
1 Define speed as distance travelled per unit time; recall and use the equation
s
v =
t
2 Define velocity as speed in a given direction
3 Recall and use the equation
total distance travelled
average speed =
total time taken

1.2 Motion
Core
4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs
5 Determine, qualitatively, from given data or the shape of a distance–time graph or speed–time graph when an object is:
(a) at rest
(b) moving with constant speed
(c) accelerating
(d) decelerating

1.2 Motion
Supplement
9 Define acceleration as change in velocity per unit time; recall and use the equation
∆v
a =
∆t

1.2 Motion
Supplement
11 Calculate acceleration from the gradient of a speed–time graph
12 Know that a deceleration is a negative acceleration and use this in calculations

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「串并联电路」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.2 Motion
Core

2 Define velocit…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：1.2 Motion
Core
4 Sketch, plot and interpret distance–time and speed–time graphs… 对理解「串并联电路」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
